title: Crimson Collapse Run
description: Swipe through collapsing crimson lanes, bait risky launch boosts, and stretch your combo before the grid shuts down.

howToPlayJson.title: Crimson Collapse Run
howToPlayJson.objective: Survive a 45-second crimson collapse by dodging hostile streams, grabbing unstable boosts, and deciding when a risky launch lane is worth the multiplier spike.

controls.outcome: Shift lanes to dodge collapsing hazards

controls.input: Hold your lane through a glowing opening
controls.outcome: Gain multiplier, bonus time, and faster future waves

steps: Hazards pour down the crimson grid while your runner hugs the bottom edge.
Safe crimson boosts appear inside dangerous gaps; taking one raises the combo and speeds up the next few seconds.
One bad collision breaks the streak and chunks the timer, so every greedy lane swap is a bet.
howToPlayJson.scoring: You score for survival, near-miss rhythm, and every unstable boost captured. Multipliers rise with clean risky pickups, not just passive endurance.
tips: Use the center lane as your reset point before chasing a launch boost.
A small combo is safer than a broken timer; treat the multiplier like a wager.
Late waves accelerate hardest after greedy pickups, so read the next opening before committing.
